label: ILC1
evidence: The label 'ILC1' is used by the authors in the main text (Nature, 2024, doi:10.1038/s41586-024-08002-x) and supplementary material to refer to 'innate lymphoid cell type 1' in the context of their single-cell atlas of human skin. The paper mentions identification of ILC1 as a distinct immune subtype; the naming matches standard conventions and is explicitly used by the authors.
